svg.text: 8-phase sequential gates · per-asset O(1) parallelism · CIO discovers skills live at runtime
Discovers skills live · sets screen_scope & screen_criteria
Picks: gather_skills[] · panel_skills[] · desk_skill · chair_skill → PLAN
ETF holdings · analyst screeners · earnings transcripts
Applies screen_criteria → returns 5-10 tickers with thesis/catalyst
Assets fan out in parallel — each asset gets its own gather pipeline
Merges all gather seat findings into single brief per asset
Input: gather_skills[] outputs → Output: one structured brief per asset
PHASE 4 — PANEL (per-asset pipeline · MAX_PANEL=3 · voting lenses)
Each asset gets its own panel — each lens sees ONE asset only
Sees all panelByAsset outputs + guardrail memo · cross-asset view
Tally must sum to exact vote count · no fabrication
Byte-count verified · retry once on failure
All assets run in parallel — python3 ledger.py add per ticker
